text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're on the bus bound for summer camp, but
Tamamo Cross is a nervous wreck. It seems the
cars speeding past the bus have her thinking
about potential traffic accidents.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I console her as best I can, and we vow to
overcome her anxiety together by the end of the
camp.
